reasoning: This animation sequence depicts a joyful, celebratory action, similar to throwing confetti or tossing a piñata. The animation will involve both arms in a dynamic, yet controlled, movement. I will use the existing examples to inform the range of motion and naturalness. Frame 1: Both arms start at the sides, slightly bent at the elbows. This creates a relaxed, anticipatory stance. Frame 2: Both arms rise simultaneously, palms facing each other. This simulates the gathering motion before the toss or throw. Frame 3: Both arms move outward and upward in a throwing motion.  This depicts the climactic action of flinging confetti or striking the piñata. Frame 4: After the throw, the arms return to a relaxed position near the sides, hands slightly open, as if celebrating the action. This completes the full gesture, showing both preparation and outcome.
